title: dns-v1
description: DNS filtering and privacy service contract v1 — 22 operations for profile-based DNS policy management, content filtering, service routing, custom rules, and device endpoint management. Designed for Control-D, NextDNS, AdGuard, and similar DNS filtering services.

operations.name: dns_info
operations.description: Account info and connectivity health check — caller IP, PoP, account status

operations.name: dns_profiles
operations.description: List all DNS filtering profiles with rule/device counts

operations.name: dns_profile
operations.description: Get full detail for a single profile including active options

operations.name: dns_filters
operations.description: List native and third-party content filters for a profile

operations.name: dns_rules
operations.description: List custom hostname-level DNS rules for a profile

operations.name: dns_devices
operations.description: List DNS endpoints (devices/resolvers) with profile assignments

operations.name: dns_network
operations.description: Service availability and latency across points of presence

operations.name: dns_services
operations.description: List active service-level rules (block/bypass/redirect) for a profile

operations.name: dns_service_catalog
operations.description: Full catalog of blockable/routable services and proxy locations

operations.name: dns_default_rule
operations.description: Get the catch-all default rule for a profile

operations.name: dns_access
operations.description: List IPs that have queried a device endpoint

operations.name: dns_analytics_config
operations.description: Analytics configuration — log levels and storage regions

operations.name: dns_profile_create
operations.description: Create a new DNS filtering profile (blank or cloned)

operations.name: dns_profile_update
operations.description: Update profile settings (name, TTL, lock status)

operations.name: dns_filters_update
operations.description: Enable/disable content filters (single or batch)

operations.name: dns_service_update
operations.description: Set a service-level rule — block, bypass, spoof, or redirect

operations.name: dns_rule_create
operations.description: Create custom hostname-level DNS rules

operations.name: dns_rule_update
operations.description: Update existing custom DNS rules

operations.name: dns_rule_delete
operations.description: Delete a custom DNS rule (destructive, requires confirmation)

operations.name: dns_default_rule_set
operations.description: Set the default catch-all rule for a profile

operations.name: dns_device_create
operations.description: Create a new DNS endpoint (device/resolver)

operations.name: dns_device_update
operations.description: Update device settings (profile assignment, name, status)

operations.name: dns_access_update
operations.description: Authorize or deauthorize IP access on a device (requires confirmation)
